q: What would you like to study in the future if you had the chance?
examiner_note:
Đây là câu hỏi giả định (Hypothetical) về ước mơ. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Sử dụng cấu trúc 'If I had the chance, I would...'. Bạn có thể chọn một môn học hoàn toàn mới (Astronomy, Marine Biology, Fine Arts) hoặc một kỹ năng (Photography, Coding). Giải thích tại sao nó lôi cuốn bạn. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'If I were to embark on...', 'have always been intrigued by', 'broaden my horizons', 'personal enrichment', 'unexplored territory'.

band7.text: If I had the chance, I would like to study Photography. I've always loved taking photos of my family and my travels, and I want to learn how to do it professionally. I think it would be a very creative and fun hobby to have.
band7.note: Sử dụng đúng cấu trúc điều kiện loại 2. Giải thích lý do đơn giản và chân thực. Từ vựng ổn định.

band8.text: If I were to embark on a new academic journey, I'd definitely choose Astronomy. I've always been intrigued by the mysteries of the universe and would love to gain a deeper understanding of celestial bodies and space exploration. It's a field that has always fascinated me.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('embark on', 'intrigued by', 'celestial bodies'). Cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

band9.text: Given the opportunity, I would love to delve into the field of Artificial Intelligence. I am profoundly fascinated by the potential of Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư to revolutionize our lives, and I believe that gaining a comprehensive understanding of its mechanisms would be both intellectually stimulating and personally enriching.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('delve into', 'profoundly fascinated', 'revolutionize', 'intellectually stimulating', 'personally enriching'). Diễn đạt cực kỳ lôi cuốn và mang tính học thuật.

v.example: After graduation, she plans to embark on a career in journalism.
I've always been intrigued by the history of ancient Egypt.
Astronomy is the study of celestial bodies like stars, planets, and galaxies.
The historian's new book delves into the causes of the French Revolution.
The invention of the smartphone has revolutionized the way we communicate.
I found the philosophy seminar to be incredibly intellectually stimulating.

v.meaning: làm giàu thêm giá trị bản thân
v.example: Traveling to different countries is a personally enriching experience that broadens your mind.
Learning a new language is a great way to broaden your horizons and meet new people.

v.meaning: vùng đất chưa được khám phá/lĩnh vực mới
v.example: For many scientists, the deep ocean remains unexplored territory.

v.meaning: sự làm giàu/nâng cao giá trị bản thân
v.example: Taking an evening class in cooking is purely for personal enrichment.
He spent every clear night looking at the stars through his telescope, pursuing his interest in Astronomy.
Studying marine biology in the Great Barrier Reef was a dream come true for her.
After high school, he decided to pursue a degree in Fine Arts and become a professional painter.
She chose to study Psychology to better understand human behavior and mental health.
The discovery of the ancient tomb was a major breakthrough in the field of Archaeology.
Reading ancient Greek Philosophy can give us a new perspective on modern problems.
His fascination with language led him to pursue a career in Linguistics.
Sociology helps us understand the complex structures and dynamics of our society.
Anthropology involves studying human cultures and societies from around the world.
He decided to study Political Science to better understand how governments work.
Intellectual curiosity is the driving force behind most scientific discoveries.
Working in a job that you're passionate about is very rewarding.
Nature has always been a great source of inspiration for my art.
Photography provides a wonderful outlet for creative expression.
University education should instill a love for lifelong learning.
His whole life was dedicated to academic pursuit and the search for truth.
She worked incredibly hard to attain her goals and fulfill her potential.
He has high aspirations for his future career in law.
Studying abroad was a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for me.
The company's vision is to create a more sustainable future for everyone.
Starting your own business is a major milestone in your professional life.
Winning the science fair was a proud achievement for the whole class.
His groundbreaking research received international recognition in the field of medicine.
Helping others gives her a real sense of personal fulfillment and purpose.
Traveling to a new country is always an exciting adventure.
The first voyage to the moon was a momentous event for all of humanity.
Scientists are on a constant quest for knowledge and understanding of the universe.
The detective worked hard to uncover the truth behind the mysterious crime.
The discovery of penicillin changed the face of modern medicine.
Marie Curie was a pioneer in the field of radioactivity research.
She was a trailblazer for women in the technology industry.
The tech company is known for its constant innovation and cutting-edge products.
The research lab is doing cutting-edge work on renewable energy sources.
She is taking an advanced course in theoretical physics.
The hospital provides specialized care for heart disease patients.
Sociology is a fascinating academic discipline that studies human society.
He is a leading expert in the field of cybersecurity.
The professor is a world authority on ancient Greek history.
She is a woman of great intellect and passion for her research.
The elder was respected for her great wisdom and experience in life.
